bead.title: Cite ddxroot resolution in the helix state-path specs
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The helix artifacts that define project-state paths need their local path-contract paragraphs to cite `ddx-06cbaa90` directly, so readers can see the governing DDx root rule where `ddxroot.Path()` is introduced instead of only finding it in trailing notes.

ROOT CAUSE
The current text already describes the state-path model in `docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-031-bead-state-machine.md:333-384`, `docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-019-multi-project-server-topology.md:65-78`, and `docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-020-multi-machine-coordinator-topology.md:88-98`, but the citation is not attached to the paragraphs that actually define the contract.

PROPOSED FIX
Update those three docs so the path-contract paragraphs explicitly cite `ddx-06cbaa90`, and add `cli/internal/agent/helix_docs_test.go` with a focused citation guard that scans those files for the required reference. Keep the changes textual and local to the cited path paragraphs.

NON-SCOPE
- No behavior changes in CLI or storage code.
- No install-topology edits.
- No migration tooling for existing in-tree repos.

Governing deps: `ddx-06cbaa90`.
In-scope files: `docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-031-bead-state-machine.md`, `docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-019-multi-project-server-topology.md`, `docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-020-multi-machine-coordinator-topology.md`, `cli/internal/agent/helix_docs_test.go`.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestHelixDocs_CiteDdxRootResolution` exists and verifies `TD-031`, `SD-019`, and `SD-020` each cite `ddx-06cbaa90` next to the local project-state path paragraph.
2. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... ./internal/config/... ./internal/registry/...` passes.
3. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
